name: APOGEE ENTERPRISES, INC.
business: Apogee Enterprises is a leading provider of architectural building products and services, and high-performance coated materials used in a variety of applications. The company operates through four segments: Architectural Metals, Architectural Services, Architectural Glass, and Performance Surfaces. Its products and services are primarily used in non-residential construction and in applications such as wall decor, digital displays, and industrial flooring.

exposures.sentence: Our Architectural Metals Segment designs, engineers and fabricates aluminum window, curtainwall, storefront and entrance systems used primarily in non-residential construction.

The Performance Surfaces Segment develops and manufactures high-performance coated materials for a variety of applications, including wall decor, museums, graphic design, digital displays, architectural interiors, and industrial flooring.

The Performance Surfaces Segment develops and manufactures high-performance coated materials for a variety of applications, including wall decor, museums, graphic design, digital displays, architectural interiors, and industrial flooring.

Our high-performance thermal framing systems, energy-efficient architectural glass, and other products are designed to help improve building energy efficiency, reduce greenhouse gas emissions, and increase security and comfort for building occupants.
